A **raion** ([Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukrainian_language "Ukrainian language"): район, [romanized](/wiki/Romanization_of_Ukrainian "Romanization of Ukrainian"): *raion*; pl. райони, *raiony*), often translated as **district**, is the second-level [administrative division](/wiki/Administrative_divisions_of_Ukraine "Administrative divisions of Ukraine") in [Ukraine](/wiki/Ukraine "Ukraine"). [Raions](/wiki/Raion "Raion") were created in a 1922 administrative reform of the [Soviet Union](/wiki/Soviet_Union "Soviet Union"), to which Ukraine, as the [Ukrainian Soviet Socialist Republic](/wiki/Ukrainian_Soviet_Socialist_Republic "Ukrainian Soviet Socialist Republic"), belonged.[[1]](#cite_note-20Ukraine%25201932rainons-1)[[nb 1]](#cite_note-3)

On 17 July 2020, the [Verkhovna Rada](/wiki/Verkhovna_Rada "Verkhovna Rada") (Ukraine's parliament) approved an administrative reform to merge most of the 490 raions, along with the "[cities of regional significance](/wiki/City_of_regional_significance_(Ukraine) "City of regional significance (Ukraine)")", which were previously outside the raions, into just 136 reformed raions.[[3]](#cite_note-4) Most tasks of the raions (education, healthcare, sport facilities, culture, and social welfare) were taken over by new [hromadas](/wiki/Hromada "Hromada"), the subdivisions of raions.[[4]](#cite_note-reformi697326-5) The 136 new districts include ten in Crimea, which have been *de facto* outside Ukrainian control since the start of the [Russo-Ukrainian War](/wiki/Russo-Ukrainian_War "Russo-Ukrainian War") in 2014.

## Districts of cities

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Raions_of_Ukraine&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Districts of cities")]

Further information: [Urban districts of Ukraine](/wiki/Urban_districts_of_Ukraine "Urban districts of Ukraine")

Some cities of oblast significance, along with the two [cities of national significance](/wiki/City_with_special_status "City with special status") (Kyiv and [Sevastopol](/wiki/Sevastopol "Sevastopol")[[nb 2]](#cite_note-9)), are also divided in *city raions*, also called *urban raions*. City raions have their own local administration and are subordinated directly to a city. They may contain other cities, towns, and villages.

## July 2020 reform

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Raions_of_Ukraine&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: July 2020 reform")]

On 17 July 2020, the number of raions in Ukraine was reduced to 136 (incl. 10 in Crimea) from the previous 490.[[8]](#cite_note-10)

Changes

* [Nyzhnohirskyi Raion](/wiki/Nyzhnohirskyi_Raion "Nyzhnohirskyi Raion") merged into [Bilohirsk Raion](/wiki/Bilohirsk_Raion "Bilohirsk Raion").

* [Dzhankoi Raion](/wiki/Dzhankoy_Raion "Dzhankoy Raion") included the city of [Dzhankoi](/wiki/Dzhankoy "Dzhankoy").
* [Simferopol Raion](/wiki/Simferopol_Raion "Simferopol Raion") included the city of [Simferopol](/wiki/Simferopol "Simferopol").
* Feodosia (new) created from [Sovietskyi Raion](/wiki/Sovietskyi_Raion "Sovietskyi Raion"), [Kirovske Raion](/wiki/Kirovske_Raion "Kirovske Raion"), [Feodosia](/wiki/Feodosia "Feodosia"), and [Sudak](/wiki/Sudak "Sudak").
* Yalta Raion (new) created from [Yalta](/wiki/Yalta "Yalta") and [Alushta](/wiki/Alushta "Alushta").

## Former names

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Raions_of_Ukraine&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Former names")]

As a result of [decommunization](/wiki/Decommunization_in_Ukraine "Decommunization in Ukraine") and [derussification](/wiki/Derussification_in_Ukraine "Derussification in Ukraine") efforts, many toponyms have been renamed, including some raions.

* Dnipropetrovsk Raion → [Dnipro Raion](/wiki/Dnipro_Raion "Dnipro Raion")
* Dniprodzerzhynsk Raion → [Kamianske Raion](/wiki/Kamianske_Raion "Kamianske Raion")
* Novomoskovsk Raion → [Samar Raion](/wiki/Samar_Raion "Samar Raion")
* Artemivsk Raion → [Bakhmut Raion](/wiki/Bakhmut_Raion "Bakhmut Raion")
* Krasnoarmiisk Raion → [Pokrovsk Raion](/wiki/Pokrovsk_Raion "Pokrovsk Raion")
* Komsomolske Raion → [Kalmiuske Raion](/wiki/Kalmiuske_Raion "Kalmiuske Raion")
* Krasnohrad Raion → [Berestyn Raion](/wiki/Berestyn_Raion "Berestyn Raion")
* Severodonetsk Raion → [Siverskodonetsk Raion](/wiki/Siverskodonetsk_Raion "Siverskodonetsk Raion")
* Sverdlovsk Raion → [Dovzhansk Raion](/wiki/Dovzhansk_Raion "Dovzhansk Raion")
* Chervonohrad Raion → [Sheptytskyi Raion](/wiki/Sheptytskyi_Raion "Sheptytskyi Raion")
* Kotovsk Raion → [Podilsk Raion](/wiki/Podilsk_Raion "Podilsk Raion")
* Kuznetsovsk Raion → [Varash Raion](/wiki/Varash_Raion "Varash Raion")
* Volodymyr-Volynskyi Raion → [Volodymyr Raion](/wiki/Volodymyr_Raion "Volodymyr Raion")
* Novohrad-Volynskyi Raion → [Zviahel Raion](/wiki/Zviahel_Raion "Zviahel Raion")
